content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift SecureField) with subscription paywall (App/PaywallView.swift), demo credentials are provided (fastlane/metadata/review_information/demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt), but notes.txt contains only "n/a" with no instructions.
Pierre: Apple's reviewer needs explicit steps to reach the subscription-gated features (App blocking, schedules, reports) and confirmation the IAP/subscription is testable in sandbox — a bare "n/a" note gives no guidance on navigating past the paywall or which IAP to use. Please replace notes.txt with concrete instructions (e.g. "Sign in with the credentials above, then tap Subscribe to test the sandbox purchase for Premium features") so reviewers aren't blocked.
